insight_summary: British Flag 1776 is gaining traction with your audience. Post soon with a hook that invites debate or personal reaction.

next_post.hook: Everyone says British Flag 1776 is fading — I think they are reading it wrong.

data_integrity.policy: Only real Google Trends measurements are published. When Trends is unavailable, the last real reading is reused and flagged 'cached' with its measured_at time. No values are ever randomly generated.
